notes:
Cởi mở means open-minded, willing to listen and accept different ideas. It describes a person’s attitude.

It usually talks about people, but can also describe environments or discussions.  

It’s about mindset, not personality type — you can be quiet but still cởi mở.  
Opposite: bảo thủ (stubborn, conservative), khép kín (closed-off).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always tries to be open-minded when listening to others' opinions.
She is very open-minded so she easily makes friends with everyone.
An open-minded work environment helps employees feel more comfortable.

translation.en: She is always open when talking.

content.sentence: Cô ấy luôn ___ khi nói chuyện.
Anh ấy rất ___ với mọi người.

translation.en: He is very open with everyone.

notes_md:
**Cởi mở** means open-minded, willing to listen and accept different ideas. It describes a person’s attitude.

It usually talks about people, but can also describe environments or discussions.  

It’s about mindset, not personality type — you can be quiet but still cởi mở.  
Opposite: **bảo thủ** (stubborn, conservative), **khép kín** (closed-off).
exampleSentences: Anh luôn cố gắng cởi mở khi nghe ý kiến của người khác.
Chị ấy rất cởi mở nên dễ dàng kết bạn với mọi người.
Môi trường làm việc cởi mở giúp nhân viên cảm thấy thoải mái hơn.

example.en: She is very open-minded and easily makes friends with everyone.
example.vi: Cô ấy rất cởi mở và dễ dàng kết bạn với mọi người.

definitions.en: A friendly attitude, willing to share and accept new ideas.
definitions.vi: Thái độ thân thiện, sẵn sàng chia sẻ và tiếp nhận ý kiến mới.
